introSection: African Spin is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Tatzmania Löffingen in Germany. The ride opened alongside the newly rebranded park on August 3, 2018.
fullText:
African Spin is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Tatzmania Löffingen in Germany. The ride opened alongside the newly rebranded park on August 3, 2018.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
